name: Trimble Viewpoint Team Field Collaboration API
what_it_does: Trimble Viewpoint Team construction field collaboration REST API for project communication, document management, RFI workflow, and field-to-office connectivity for construction projects. Enables AI agents to manage project document distribution and version control for field team document management automation, handle RFI creation, routing, and response tracking for field team RFI workflow automation, access submittal log and shop drawing review workflow for procurement tracking automation, retrieve daily field report and photo submission for project documentation automation, manage punch list and deficiency item creation for quality control automation, handle project meeting agenda and minutes distribution for project communication automation, access markup and annotation workflow for field document review automation, retrieve project directory and contact management for team communication, manage drawing and specification set management for field document accessibility, and integrate Viewpoint Team with Viewpoint Vista and Spectrum ERP, Trimble Connect, and project management platforms for connected construction operations.
use_cases: Managing RFIs from field communication agents
Distributing drawings from document management agents
Tracking submittals from procurement coordination agents
Logging daily reports from field documentation agents
not_for: Construction accounting and job costing (use Vista or Spectrum)
BIM model coordination and clash detection (use Trimble Connect or Navisworks)
Advanced scheduling CPM analysis (use Primavera or MS Project)
best_when: A general contractor or subcontractor using Trimble Viewpoint Vista or Spectrum ERP wanting AI agents to automate field team RFI management, document distribution, daily reporting, submittal tracking, and punch list management within Viewpoint Team as the field collaboration layer.
avoid_when: TRIMBLE VIEWPOINT PRODUCT PORTFOLIO CONFUSION: Trimble Viewpoint includes Vista (enterprise ERP), Spectrum (mid-market ERP), Team (field collaboration), and ProContractor (small contractor); Viewpoint Team is the field collaboration tool, not the accounting system; automated workflows that require job cost or financial data must use Vista or Spectrum API, not Team; Team integration without ERP integration creates workflow gaps for cost-tracking construction workflows. RFI RESPONSE LICENSED PROFESSIONAL REVIEW MANDATORY: Automated RFI routing in Viewpoint Team must never auto-issue RFI responses on behalf of architect or engineer without licensed professional review; automated RFI response forwarding without design professional approval creates construction defect and professional liability exposure. SUBMITTAL APPROVAL STAMP REQUIRES LICENSED ENGINEER: Automated submittal workflow in Viewpoint Team for shop drawing approval must route to licensed engineer or architect for approval stamp before construction use; automated submittal status advancement without licensed professional review creates construction defect claim exposure.

auth.notes: Trimble Viewpoint Team uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Portland, Oregon HQ (pre-Trimble acquisition). Acquired by Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) in 2018 for $1.2B as part of Viewpoint acquisition. Viewpoint Team targets Viewpoint ERP users for field collaboration. Vista and Spectrum ERP integration. Field-to-office connectivity. Mobile-first field app. Competes with Procore Field, Autodesk Build, and PlanGrid for construction field collaboration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription; typically bundled with Viewpoint Vista or Spectrum
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user subscription; bundled with Viewpoint ERP in enterprise licensing; field collaboration modules
pricing.notes: Portland OR / Sunnyvale CA. Trimble NASDAQ:TRMB. Viewpoint acquired 2018 $1.2B. Team is field collaboration layer for Viewpoint ERP. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; document and RFI queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — FIELD COLLABORATION EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Viewpoint Team does not support native webhooks; automated RFI response, submittal approval, and daily report submission events require scheduled polling aligned with construction project communication cycles

VIEWPOINT ERP INTEGRATION IS PRIMARY VALUE DRIVER: Viewpoint Team's primary value is field-to-office connectivity to Viewpoint Vista or Spectrum ERP; standalone Viewpoint Team automation without ERP integration lacks job cost, purchasing, and financial data context; automated field collaboration without ERP integration creates operational workflow that doesn't connect to accounting system of record

RFI RESPONSE LICENSED PROFESSIONAL GATE: Automated RFI workflows in Viewpoint Team must never auto-forward architect or engineer responses without licensed professional review; RFI response is a design document with professional liability; automated response forwarding without design professional confirmation creates construction defect and E&O liability

Trimble product data overlap between Team and Prolog — Trimble Viewpoint Team and Trimble Prolog both offer RFI, submittal, and daily report functionality; customers using both products may have data overlap; automated workflows must identify which Trimble system is the designated master for each project document type to prevent duplicate document creation

Field mobile app offline sync conflict — Viewpoint Team field app supports offline data entry; automated office-side document creation may conflict with offline field-side data sync when field devices reconnect; implement conflict resolution for simultaneous offline/online document edits on same RFI or punch list item

Subcontractor access control and document sharing — Viewpoint Team multi-company project access allows GC and subcontractor teams to share documents; automated document distribution must enforce access control per trade scope; automated broad document distribution without trade scope filter creates intellectual property and bid confidentiality exposure on competitive projects
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction field collaboration. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/AU. RFI, submittal, and project document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction field collaboration. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/AU. Project document and communication data.
